title: PJTSAU – Field Investigator – 1 Posts
shortInfo: PJTSAU Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 contract post. Candidates with B.Sc. (Ag.) or Diploma in Agriculture can attend the walk-in interview on 30 May 2026. Check eligibility, salary, selection process, and notification details at pjtsau.edu.in.
